overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player riding an elevator up to a street level, exiting into a neon-lit covered walkway featuring the '2nd Amendment' gun store, exploring the storefront and entering a shooting range, then walking through an urban plaza toward a stairwell. The footage features high-fidelity cyberpunk aesthetics with vivid neon lighting and detailed urban environments.

events.description: elevator lighting shifts from cool blue to warm orange-red as the screens glitch
advertising screens change content from error message to mountain landscape scenery

agents.ego_description: standing in the elevator watching the news screens while ascending to the destination floor

entered.detail: four large digital screens arranged in a grid showing a news broadcast with red ERROR overlay
vertical metallic panel with floor indicator lights showing upward movement
horizontal brushed metal handrails mounted on the side walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic elevator with four digital screens showing a glitched news broadcast. The ambient lighting shifts from cool blue to warm orange as the screens flicker and change content, while the floor indicator shows the elevator ascending.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with gun store entrance

events.description: elevator metal mesh doors slide open revealing the neon-lit street level exterior

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the elevator into the covered walkway and turning to face the storefronts

entered.detail: sliding mesh metal security gates that open to the exterior walkway
large bright red neon sign reading 2ND AMENDMENT with a hexagonal gun logo
illuminated posters with GUNS SALE! text and American flag motifs
traditional paper lanterns with Japanese characters hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The elevator doors open to reveal a covered cyberpunk walkway bathed in red neon light from the 2nd Amendment gun store signage. The camera steps out onto the concrete walkway, passing Japanese paper lanterns and illuminated sale posters flanking the store entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gun store frontage with weapon display boards and neon signage

events.description: camera turns toward the store entrance doorway preparing to enter

agents.ego_description: walking around the storefront examining the weapon price displays and sale posters on the walls

entered.detail: large digital display board showing various firearms with specifications and prices in red text
open doorway with metal frame leading into the shooting range interior
hanging flag with stars and stripes displayed next to the sale posters

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the gun store exterior, moving past bright red neon signage and examining a detailed weapon price board displaying various firearms. The environment features a mix of cyberpunk neon aesthetics with traditional Japanese architectural elements like hanging paper lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor shooting range with targets and observation benches

events.description: entering the gun store interior and moving into the shooting range area

agents.ego_description: walking into the shooting range area past the counter and observing the targets downrange

notable_agents.action: security guard standing with arms crossed near the range entrance

entered.detail: circular bullseye target boards visible downrange through the safety mesh
black shooting benches with equipment rests arranged in lanes
large industrial ceiling fan with four blades rotating slowly
metal safety mesh separating the shooting lanes from the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions indoors to a shooting range with metal safety mesh, shooting benches, and targets visible downrange. An NPC security guard stands near the entrance as the camera moves through the facility, passing under a large industrial ceiling fan.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with storefronts and vending machines

events.description: exiting the gun store area into the open plaza with scattered debris

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward a stairwell and vending machines, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark shorts walking across the plaza

entered.detail: red neon sign reading FUYUTSUKI mounted on a concrete building facade
purple-lit vending machine with glowing interface near the wall
staircase leading upward with green emergency lighting
debris and discarded items littering the concrete plaza floor

segments.scene_description: The camera exits into a wide urban plaza scattered with trash and debris, featuring a glowing red Fuyutsuki sign and a purple vending machine. The player walks toward a concrete stairwell with green lighting while a pedestrian crosses the plaza in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed space of a futuristic elevator into a vibrant, neon-lit urban district. It begins inside the ascending lift where digital screens flicker with glitched news broadcasts, shifting the ambient light from cool blue to warm orange. As the doors open, the camera steps out onto a concrete walkway bathed in red neon light, passing Japanese paper lanterns and illuminated posters outside the 2nd Amendment gun store. The scene then transitions from the store's detailed weapon price boards into an indoor shooting range characterized by metal safety mesh and a large industrial ceiling fan. Finally, the camera exits the facility into a wide, debris-strewn urban plaza featuring a purple vending machine and a glowing red sign before moving toward a green-lit concrete stairwell.
